title: Jianying Subtitle Styling for Film Narration
summary: Use Jianying (CapCut Pro 剪映专业版) to add vertical, calligraphic Chinese subtitles on the right side of the frame to an input film, matching the styling and placement of a separate reference video, and export the edited video.
taskPrompt:
Goal: Use Jianying (CapCut) to add subtitles to the input video.

Requirements:
- Subtitle layout: vertical (竖排), positioned at the right side of the frame.
- Font style: artistic / calligraphic Chinese style matching the reference video.
- Text content: use the lyrics / narration from the input video (not the reference text).

Inputs:
- Input video: `input/input.mp4`
- Reference video (different film) showing the desired subtitle style, layout, and position: `reference/reference.mp4`

Output:
- Export the edited video to `output/agent_output.mp4`.

Instructions:
1. Watch the reference video to understand the desired vertical calligraphic subtitle style and positioning.
2. Open the input video in Jianying.
3. Add subtitles matching the input video's audio / narration content.
4. Style the subtitles to match the reference: vertical layout, calligraphic font, positioned on the right side of the frame.
5. Export the final video.
agentMustDo: Watch `reference/reference.mp4` to internalize the desired vertical / calligraphic / right-aligned subtitle style.
Transcribe or otherwise produce subtitles that match the input video's audio / narration (do not copy the reference video's text).
Style every subtitle vertically (竖排) on the right side of the frame using a calligraphic Chinese font that visually matches the reference.
Export the final edited video to exactly `output/agent_output.mp4`.

inputFiles.name: input.mp4
inputFiles.description: Source film to subtitle. The audio / narration is the basis of the subtitle text.

inputFiles.name: reference.mp4
inputFiles.description: A different film whose subtitle style, layout, and position the agent must imitate (style only — not text content).

referenceFiles.name: agent_output.mp4
referenceFiles.description: Exported edited video with the new vertical calligraphic right-side subtitles.

evaluation: Evaluator samples four fixed timecodes in both `output/agent_output.mp4` and `reference/reference.mp4`, extracts a frame at each timecode on the VM via ffmpeg, and asks an LLM-vision judge whether the target subtitle style and layout match the reference (ignoring background and the exact subtitle text content, focusing on orientation, font style, and position). Per-frame score is 0 or 1; final score is the mean across the four sampled frames.

evaluatorCredentials.purpose: OpenAI vision/LLM judge scores the deliverable during evaluate(); sourced from secret/eval_time/openai.env
